subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! This is a title which the very essences of existence, both seen and unseen, earnestly yearn and long to attain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی این عنوانیست که جواهر وجزد از غیب و شهود تمنا و آرزوی آنرا
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
